name: Impossible Ecology
description: Calibrate three global fields, infer five coupled organism responses, and continuously shepherd every organism into its matching sanctuary.
natural_language: Calibrate three fields. Shepherd five organisms into matching sanctuaries.

metadata.variant_count_kind: spatial layout, field-response assignment, sanctuary placement, and coupled-dynamics combinations
metadata.notes: Five inertial organisms share one obstacle-filled arena and respond simultaneously to three selectable global fields. The verifier independently replays field selection, held-pointer motion, every physics tick, collisions, and five spatial captures.
